title: Facilitator Guide — Day 12 — Your First Business Tool
prepChecklist: Print persona cards and FNA dyad observation forms
Brief mentors: FNA is a business tool, not compliance paperwork

sessionFlow.notes: Restaurant / doctor / mechanic / advisor comparison. No products.
Squads map how ventures diagnose before delivering.
Strict discovery discipline. Mentors score listening.
Connect needs to Week 2 validated problems.

debriefQuestions: Who treated FNA as paperwork vs a business tool?
What needs appeared across multiple squads?
How does diagnosis connect to trust?
commonPitfalls: Teaching FNA as insurance process instead of entrepreneur diagnostic
coachingTips: Link every insight to client value, not form completion
